methods.int[] calculateLength(CharSequence msgBo: Calculates the number of SMS's required to encode the message body and the number of characters remaining until the next message.
methods.int[] calculateLength(String messageBody: Calculates the number of SMS's required to encode the message body and the number of characters remaining until the next message, given the current encoding.
methods.SmsMessage createFromPdu(byte[] pdu): This method was deprecated in API level 23. Use createFromPdu(byte[], java.lang.String) instead.
methods.SmsMessage createFromPdu(byte[] pdu, Str: Create an SmsMessage from a raw PDU with the specified message format.
methods.String getDisplayMessageBody(): Returns the message body, or email message body if this message was from an email gateway.
methods.String getDisplayOriginatingAddress(): Returns the originating address, or email from address if this message was from an email gateway.
methods.int getIndexOnIcc(): Returns the record index of the message on the ICC (1-based index).
methods.int getIndexOnSim(): This method was deprecated in API level 15. Use getIndexOnIcc instead.
methods.String getMessageBody(): Returns the message body as a String, if it exists and is text based.
methods.SmsMessage.MessageClass getMessageClass(: Returns the class of this message.
methods.String getOriginatingAddress(): Returns the originating address (sender) of this SMS message in String form or null if unavailable.
methods.byte[] getPdu(): Returns the raw PDU for the message.
methods.String getPseudoSubject(): Unofficial convention of a subject line enclosed in parens empty string if not present
methods.String getRecipientAddress(): Returns the recipient address(receiver) of this SMS message in String form or null if unavailable.
methods.String getServiceCenterAddress(): Returns the address of the SMS service center that relayed this message or null if there is none.
methods.int getStatus(): GSM: For an SMS-STATUS-REPORT message, this returns the status field from the status report.
methods.int getStatusOnIcc(): Returns the status of the message on the ICC (read, unread, sent, unsent).
methods.int getStatusOnSim(): This method was deprecated in API level 15. Use getStatusOnIcc instead.
methods.SmsMessage.SubmitPdu getSubmitPdu(String: Gets an SMS-SUBMIT PDU for a destination address and a message.
Gets an SMS-SUBMIT PDU for a data message to a destination address & port.
methods.int getTPLayerLengthForPDU(String pdu): Get the TP-Layer-Length for the given SMS-SUBMIT PDU Basically, the length in bytes (not hex chars) less the SMSC header FIXME: This method is only used by a CTS test case that isn't run on CDMA devices.
methods.long getTimestampMillis(): Returns the service centre timestamp in currentTimeMillis() format
methods.byte[] getUserData(): returns the user data section minus the user data header if one was present.
methods.boolean isCphsMwiMessage(): Returns true for CPHS MWI toggle message.
methods.boolean isEmail(): Returns true if message is an email.
methods.boolean isMWIClearMessage(): returns true if this message is a CPHS voicemail / message waiting indicator (MWI) clear message
methods.boolean isMWISetMessage(): returns true if this message is a CPHS voicemail / message waiting indicator (MWI) set message
methods.boolean isMwiDontStore(): returns true if this message is a "Message Waiting Indication Group: Discard Message" notification and should not be stored.
methods.boolean isReplace(): See TS 23.040 9.2.3.9 returns true if this is a "replace short message" SMS
methods.boolean isReplyPathPresent(): Returns true iff the TP-Reply-Path bit is set in this message.
methods.boolean isStatusReportMessage(): Return true iff the message is a SMS-STATUS-REPORT message.
